title: Hut 8 Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2024 Results
text: Hut 8 delivered strong results for the full year 2024: Revenue of $162.4 million (up 69% YoY from $96.0 million). Net Income of $331.4 million vs. $21.9 million in 2023. Adjusted EBITDA of $555.7 million compared to $85.7 million prior year. Q4 2024 quarterly revenue was $31.7 million with net income of $152.0 million and adjusted EBITDA of $310.6 million. Revenue breakdown across three platform segments: Power $56.6 million, Digital Infrastructure $17.5 million, Compute $80.7 million, Other $7.6 million. Operational Highlights: Total energy capacity under management is 1,020 MW with a development pipeline of 12,300 MW (2,800 MW under exclusivity). Energy cost per MWh in Q4 was $31.63 (30% decrease YoY). Strategic Bitcoin reserve of 10,171 BTC valued at $949.5 million. Key Infrastructure Expansion: Vega facility at 205 MW behind-the-meter site targeting Q2 2025 energization. Salt Creek facility of 63 MW completed in three months at approximately $240,000/MW. River Bend campus with 592 acres secured for AI data center development. Strategic Partnerships: $150 million investment from Coatue for AI infrastructure co-development. BITMAIN colocation contract generating approximately $125 million annualized revenue at full capacity. Highrise AI subsidiary launched for GPU-as-a-Service operations. Capital Actions: Company converted $37.9 million Anchorage Digital debt to equity at 51% premium. Launched $500 million ATM program. Established $250 million stock repurchase authorization.
